title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Habitat for Humanity provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner families. Houses are built with volunteer labor and use donated materials. Volunteer opportunities available. 1255 NW US 101 Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Households with income between 45-70% of area median income, based on family size; must have demonstrated need; must be willing to partner and complete sweat equity. Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (458) 277-7601 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 277-7601 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Households are responsible for closing costs, a small down payment, and establishing an escrow account to pay the first year of taxes and insurance. Call or visit the website for more information. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Tuesday 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located inside First Presbyterian Church. Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITY HOME REPAIR PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY
